title: A man reported multiple sightings in 15 days of a star-like UFO in Taguatinga-DF [1992]
excerpt: NOV 7th, 1992. 20:50. Duration: 110 minutes. A man in the region of Taguatinga, Distrito Federal, reported that he has been constantly seeing an unidentified flying object for fifteen days. text_preview: NOV 7th, 1992. 20:50. Duration: 110 minutes. A man in the region of Taguatinga, Distrito Federal, reported that he has been constantly seeing an unidentified flying object for fifteen days. Together with two other people, the witness observed the sighting of this report with binoculars and, according to him, the UFO was round, with the appearance of a star, but as if it were “four headlights together” at an altitude of approximately 1,000 meters. According to him, it was like a “lamp, without color; satin” at very slow speed. “The witness stated that he observed the UFO moving in circles in th
summary: A man in Taguatinga-DF reported 15 days of repeated sightings of a star-like UFO resembling four headlights; on Nov 7, 1992 it disappeared at fast speed after 22:00.
